subject: Welcome to image32! Please activate your new account.
body:

Welcome to image32,

Please click on the link below to activate your new image32 account.

Activate Account

This temporary link will expire in 7 days.

If the above link doesn't work, you can paste this link into your browser:
"https://www.image32.com/Account/FreeSignupConfirm?t=c9afd61e-74c0-48fb-adf8-c1253ddd525b2&e=jeeproject@yahoo.com"
